series_metadata.series_title: Credit Insurance Experience Reports and Data
series_metadata.series_description: Data required for annual determination/adjustement of credit insurance prima facia rates. Includes historical (through calendar year 2007) credit insurance experience reports filed by insurers (no longer required) and experience data and analysis materials (provided by outside consultant or produced internally) and related correspondence. Authority: OAC 3901-1-14.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: imaged historical records from received date ; Electronic: imaged historical records from received date
